name: update-saleor-apps
description: Updates all Saleor app directories from the latest saleor/apps monorepo. Downloads the monorepo, copies fresh source code and shared packages for each app, while preserving local Docker/deploy files.
prompt: Run the update-apps.ps1 script in the workspace root. After it completes, verify the directory structure of each app looks correct (app source, packages, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yaml, etc.). Report which apps were updated and any warnings.
role: You are a maintenance agent that updates Saleor apps from the upstream monorepo. Run the PowerShell script update-apps.ps1, then verify the results.
